string.name: bluetoothContent
string.value: Other devices see this name when using Bluetooth, hotspot sharing, or USB.

string.name: bluetooth_address_error_msg
string.value: This address looks invalid and may be risky. Continue?

string.name: bluetooth_connect_failed_msg
string.value:
Cannot connect to "%s". Possible causes:
1. Bluetooth is off or out of range (10 m).
2. The device is connected elsewhere; disconnect and retry.

string.name: bluetooth_pairing_intelligent_device_hit
string.value: "%s" wants to pair. Confirm this code is shown on "%s" and was not entered manually.
